CustomField.formula:
IF( ISBLANK( Account.Id ) || ISPICKVAL(Account.Identification_Criteria__c,''),"",
If( (ISPICKVAL(Account.Identification_Criteria__c,'300057')),
Image("https://docs.mobility.belfius.be/img/sfdc_template_prod/"+ Text(Account.Identification_Criteria__c)+".png", '' ,65,-1),
IF( CONTAINS( $Label.PatnerImage_values_Case , TEXT(Account.Identification_Criteria__c) )
, Image("http://img.axus.be/logos/Ayvens-group.png", '' ,65,-1), IMAGE("http://img.aldautomotive.be/sfdc_template_uat/"+ Text(Account.Identification_Criteria__c)+".png", '' ,65,-1))
)
)
CustomField.label: BEL-PartnerImage
